PLURAL FUTURES LOST 2025

01 · Concept

Where memory
meets invented
geography

Lost Futures maps emotional residue onto navigable virtual space — nostalgia without origin, longing without object. Each environment built from fragments: a bedroom suspended above nothing, a street that leads only to reflection.

The brand identity holds this ambiguity without resolving it. Neither nostalgic nor futurist. Both, simultaneously, failing.

To grieve the future is to admit you once believed in it.

04 · Digital

The screen
as threshold
not window

Digital touchpoints resist resolution. Every interface element introduces slight instability — text that arrives delayed, images that take a moment too long to focus. Time as texture.

The VR headset becomes the logo of the experience. What do you see when the world you inhabit isn't real? The answer is always yourself.

Immersion is just another word for surrender.
